extraction_contract: Use the PDF/AIP section as the source of truth for expected values.
Extract field-value pairs exactly at the documentary field level shown by the AIP.
Do not split a documented field into semantic subfields such as meters/feet, Spanish/English variants, coordinates, phones or temperatures unless the source presents them as separate fields.
Use tables[] only when the source presents repeated rows/columns; table columns must be the documentary column headings.
Preserve NIL, No, blank/null cells and bilingual values as the cell or field value.

fields.label: REGLAMENTO LOCAL DEL AERODROMO / LOCAL AERODROME REGULATIONS
fields.expected: Las OPS VFR deberan ajustarse a lo establecido en el ANEXO BRAVO, excepto el inciso c) donde debe reemplazarse el valor por 1.000 ft. / VFR OPS shall conform to BRAVO ANNEX, except c) where the value should be replaced by 1,000 ft.

fields.label: REGLAMENTO LOCAL DEL AERODROMO / LOCAL AERODROME REGULATIONS
fields.expected: En las circunstancias detalladas en el ENR 1.4, el piloto que decida realizar vuelos VFR, debera coordinar previamente con el Jefe de Aerodromo y/o Explotador de Aerodromo la asignacion de PSN para estacionamiento, tambien con el Proveedor de Combustible (en caso de necesitarlo) y otras coordinaciones operativas necesarias. / In the circumstances detailed in ENR 1.4, the pilot who decides to perform VFR flights must previously coordinate with the Aerodrome Head and/or Aerodrome Operator the assignment of PSN for parking, also with the Fuel Supplier (in case of need) and other necessary operational coordination
